_comment: Sprint 19.3 — Compliance-Bot interactive Hermes flow. Wake-on-message via Hermes' chat-platform adapter (Slack/Matrix/etc.). The flow has NO cron schedule; Hermes fires it whenever a DM lands in the configured platform. Like audit-reviewer-daily.json, drop this entry into ~/.hermes/cron/jobs.json — the schedule field below is a Hermes 'interval' set to a no-op long enough that the cron tick won't pre-empt platform-driven wakes. See docs/hermes-jobs/compliance-bot.md for the full system prompt; this manifest just points at it.
name: compliance-bot
prompt: You are PointlesSQL Compliance-Bot. See docs/hermes-jobs/compliance-bot.md for the full system prompt; the harness should override this `prompt` field with the canonical Markdown system prompt at platform-message time. Do NOT answer with this stub directly — fail loudly so the operator notices the misconfiguration.
